features.name: Authentication
features.description: User login, signup, password reset, and session management using Supabase Auth.

features.name: Product Search & Tax Engine
features.description: Search products by EAN, NCM, or Name, and calculate IBS/CBS taxes with comparative analysis.

features.name: AI Insights (Gemini)
features.description: Generates simplified tax explanations and processes images for barcode extraction.

features.name: Subscription & Payments
features.description: Pricing plans, Stripe checkout integration, and organization management.

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Backoffice for managing users, organizations, and products.
